name: waitlist-landing-page-with-countdown-timer
title: Waitlist Landing Page With Countdown Timer

_meta.author: muhammad-binsalman
_meta.title: Waitlist Landing Page with Countdown Timer
_meta.description: A sleek waitlist component featuring a mesmerizing ethereal beam background, countdown timer, and social proof indicators. Perfect for product launches, beta releases, or early access campaigns. Includes email capture, user avatars showing recent signups, and a live countdown creating urgency. The dark theme with vibrant gradient effects creates an engaging, modern aesthetic that converts visitors into early adopters.
